---
title: "City of Yakima, Washington"
number: 37
image: /images/yakima_WA.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Yakima, Washington"
categories: ["Rate Setting", "Integrated Solid Waste Planning",
"Landfill/Disposal"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# 2013-2025 Collection Rate Setting

# 2017 Material Recovery Feasibility Study

Bell & Associates has assisted the City of Yakima since 2013 with rate
consulting services for the City's waste collection operation as well as
perspective residential recycling programs. Mr. Bell recommended a cost of
service rate structure to maintain city services and provide adequate fund
reserves and capital replacement.

In conjunction with Green Solutions, Bell & Associates assisted the City with a
Material Recovery Facility feasibility study to determine the expected facility
size, build and operational costs, and material throughput for the City waste
stream as well as the surrounding region.

# 2009 Transfer Feasibility / Cost of Service Study

TODO: Contents

[By Quintin Soloviev - Own work, CC BY 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=192527773)
:::
